input.command:
echo "=== configmap ==="; kubectl get configmap spark-config -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== secret ==="; kubectl get secret spark-credentials -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== monitor deployment ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-monitor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== jobs ==="; kubectl get job spark-data-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
kubectl get job spark-batch-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml

description:
echo "=== configmap ==="; kubectl get configmap spark-config -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== secret ==="; kubectl get secret spark-credentials -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== monitor deployment ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-monitor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== jobs ==="; kubectl get job spark-data-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
kubectl get job spark-batch-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml

summary:
echo "=== configmap ==="; kubectl get configmap spark-config -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== secret ==="; kubectl get secret spark-credentials -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== monitor deployment ==="; kubectl get deployment spark-monitor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
echo "=== jobs ==="; kubectl get job spark-data-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml
kubectl get job spark-batch-processor -n spark-runtime -o yaml

=== monitor deployment ===
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "2"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{"kubernetes.io/change-cause":"v2 - broken image (ImagePullBackOff)"},"name":"spark-monitor","namespace":"spark-runtime"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-monitor"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-monitor"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","echo \"spark runtime monitor ready\"\nwhile true; do\n  sleep 3600\ndone\n"],"image":"busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999","name":"spark-monitor","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"300m","memory":"256Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"100m","memory":"128Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}
    kubernetes.io/change-cause: v2 - broken image (ImagePullBackOff)
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:33:59Z"
  generation: 2
  name: spark-monitor
  namespace: spark-runtime
  resourceVersion: "2822866"
  uid: a5773ca3-9161-42ff-a991-bd55f824786b
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-monitor
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-monitor
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          echo "spark runtime monitor ready"
          while true; do
            sleep 3600
          done
        image: busybox:nonexistent-tag-9999
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-monitor
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 300m
            memory: 256Mi
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 128Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T01:34:33Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-10T01:34:33Z"
    message: Deployment has minimum availability.

    status: "True"
    type: Available

    message: ReplicaSet "spark-monitor-647fb85c9c" is progressing.
    reason: ReplicaSetUpdated
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 2
  readyReplicas: 1
  replicas: 2
  unavailableReplicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-data-processor","namespace":"spark-runtime"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"suspend":true,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-data-processor"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"Running spark data processor\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[1] \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  200\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-data-processor","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark"}}}}

  namespace: spark-runtime

  uid: 86be68d8-1c2f-4347-ba71-d299ca261655
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:

    spec:

      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30

kubectl patch configmap spark-config -n spark-runtime --type merge -p '{"data":{"spark.executor.memory":"512m"}}'
kubectl patch secret spark-credentials -n spark-runtime --type merge -p '{"stringData":{"api-key":"valid-api-key-'"$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 12345)"'"}}' 2>&1 || true

content.text: It's just in a normal 30s termination grace period; will finish shortly. Let's wait for jobs to complete and monitor to stabilize.

input.command:
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-data-processor -n spark-runtime --timeout=120s &
pid1=$!
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-batch-processor -n spark-runtime --timeout=120s &
pid2=$!
wait $pid1 $pid2
echo "---jobs---"
kubectl get jobs -n spark-runtime
echo "---pods---"
kubectl get pods -n spark-runtime

content.text: My earlier `--type merge` patch replaced the whole container spec (dropping command/resources) since JSON merge patch overwrites arrays wholesale. Let me fix this with a strategic merge patch instead.

input.command:
kubectl patch deployment spark-monitor -n spark-runtime --type strategic -p '{"spec":{"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"name":"spark-monitor","command":["/bin/sh","-c","echo "spark runtime monitor ready"
while true; do
  sleep 3600
done
"],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"300m","memory":"256Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"100m","memory":"128Mi"}}}]}}}}'
kubectl rollout status deployment/spark-monitor -n spark-runtime --timeout=120s

description:

while true; do

done
"],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"300m","memory":"256Mi"},"requests":{"cpu":"100m","memory":"128Mi"}}}]}}}}'
kubectl rollout status deployment/spark-monitor -n spark-runtime --timeout=120s
